_comment: FALSE POSITIVE — SP-730001/730010: Legitimate scheduled backup job with maintenance window
scenario: Legitimate backup maintenance: admin disables backup temporarily during DR test, re-enables immediately after
why_fp: Approved change ticket exists for this maintenance window
Action performed by dedicated service account svc_backup (not SYSTEM or user account)
Only backup service stopped — no VSS deletion, no process killing, no file renaming
tuning_recommendation: Suppress alerts during approved maintenance windows by correlating with ITSM change calendar
Allowlist svc_backup and known backup admin accounts for SP-730001
SP-730010 requires all 3 stages (VSS_KILL + SERVICE_STOP + PROCESS_KILL) — single SERVICE_STOP should not fire
